title: Turn footer component for agent chat with usage metrics and status
purpose: Displays token usage, cost, stop reason, and elapsed time for each turn in an agent chat interface.
module_context: Exports a React functional component TurnFooter that accepts usage, stop reason, canceled status, and elapsed time props to render a formatted footer section.

steps.content: Initialize an array to collect footer parts based on provided props.
IF usage data is provided, add input tokens, output tokens, and cost to the parts array.
IF elapsed time is provided, calculate seconds and add to the parts array.
IF stop reason is provided, add it to the parts array.
IF no parts were added and the turn was not canceled, return null to render nothing.
ELSE render a flex container with the collected parts and optionally a canceled status.
